endpoints.name: POST /BuildJob
endpoints.description: Builds (compiles) the specified job in the specified Data Lake Analytics account for job correctness and validation.

endpoints.name: GET /Jobs
endpoints.description: Lists the jobs, if any, associated with the specified Data Lake Analytics account. The response includes a link to the next page of results, if any.

endpoints.name: GET /Jobs/{jobIdentity}
endpoints.description: Gets the job information for the specified job ID.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOBIDENTITY}} with a real jobidentity.

endpoints.name: PUT /Jobs/{jobIdentity}
endpoints.description: Submits a job to the specified Data Lake Analytics account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOBIDENTITY}} with a real jobidentity.

endpoints.name: POST /Jobs/{jobIdentity}/CancelJob
endpoints.description: Cancels the running job specified by the job ID.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOBIDENTITY}} with a real jobidentity.

endpoints.name: POST /Jobs/{jobIdentity}/GetDebugDataPath
endpoints.description: Gets the job debug data information specified by the job ID.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOBIDENTITY}} with a real jobidentity.

endpoints.name: GET /Jobs/{jobIdentity}/GetStatistics
endpoints.description: Gets statistics of the specified job.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOBIDENTITY}} with a real jobidentity.
